hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' && echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'feat:'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A feature commit was just made. Review README.md and update it to document this new feature if it is user-facing (new API, new CLI option, new behaviour, new package, etc.). If the README already covers it, no action needed."}}'; fi
